prompt:
A clean premium wellness-brand PRODUCT SHOT on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Hero product photography style with floating text and graphic callouts around it — think Apple product page or Athletic Greens / Hims product hero shot. Generous breathing room, minimal elements.

HERO SUBJECT — centered in the frame: a photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic jar with bold teal/cyan and gold/yellow accents, front label clearly readable: 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, gold lid on top, jar closed). Crisp clean studio lighting on the jar with a soft subtle shadow underneath. A few dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES sit casually scattered next to the jar's base. The jar must match the reference exactly.

FLOATING TEXT + ICON CALLOUTS — 6 small chip-style callouts arranged tastefully around the jar (3 on the left side, 3 on the right side, none overlapping the jar itself). Each callout is a small floating cluster: a tiny flat teal/cyan outlined icon, followed by a SHORT ALL-CAPS bold label in deep ink-black plus one tiny sub-line of light-gray body text. Thin gold connector lines lead from each callout toward the jar.
  Left side (top to bottom):
    – IMMUNE SUPPORT · 'Rich in antioxidants'
    – GUT HEALTH · 'Supports digestion'
    – SKIN GLOW · 'Vitamins A, C, E'
  Right side (top to bottom):
    – THYROID FUNCTION · 'Natural iodine'
    – ENERGY + STAMINA · 'Daily vitality'
    – MINERAL POWERHOUSE · '92 minerals'

TOP — a single short ALL-CAPS headline above the jar in deep ink-black: 'SIX BENEFITS. ONE GUMMY.' (bold condensed display sans-serif). Small thin gold rule beneath.

BOTTOM — a single subtle tagline: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE' in tracked light-gray all-caps. No other text.

DESIGN SYSTEM:
  • Background: pure clean white with very subtle warm-gray paper texture.
  • Accent colors: muted TEAL/CYAN, warm GOLD/YELLOW, deep INK-BLACK type, warm-gray sub-text.
  • Typography: bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines/labels, clean modern sans-serif for body. NO script fonts.
  • Icons: tiny flat outlined single-color teal/cyan, consistent stroke weight.
  • Mood: editorial wellness-brand hero shot — Athletic Greens / Hims / Apple product-page aesthetic.

ABSOLUTE RULES:
  • All text MUST be cleanly spelled, no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts.
  • 1:1 square, 4K, pure white background, NO border, NO frame.
  • Reference the provided image for brand color/type and jar appearance.
